summary: Full end-to-end testing of Resonance ERP (Node.js + Express + MongoDB backend, React + Framer Motion frontend). 34/34 pytest backend tests pass across all modules (auth, students, teachers, attendance, leaves, timetable, fees, holidays, notifications, announcements, enquiries, audit, analytics). Frontend flows verified for principal/teacher/parent/accountant roles — login, dashboard, students, attendance, leaves (with confetti), fees (paid/pending, no amounts), notifications panel, theme toggle, admission form, and role-based sidebars.
critical_code_review_comments: server.js global error handler is present and logs errors — good.
All routes are behind /api prefix; RBAC guards (auth + requireRole) applied consistently across mutations.
students/fees/attendance parent-scoping correctly implemented via parentUserId filter.
Fee schema intentionally omits amount fields per PRD — verified in Fees.jsx (no amount column) and API response.
confetti canvas correctly injected on leave approval (canvas-confetti library) — visible in DOM after approve click.
Theme toggle works: verified via localStorage.resonance_theme and documentElement.classList (dark→light transition confirmed).

Minor: /api/enquiries/public does not write an audit log (only paid path — routes/enquiries.js:14). Public submissions are logged only by request logger (morgan). Acceptable but consider audit entry for visibility.

Minor: /api/leaves GET route filters by teacherId only for teacher role; if teacher's linkedRef is empty, filter falls back to _id which may return nothing. Seed pipeline sets linkedRef so this works today.
Minor: /api/notifications/:id/read compares n.userId !== req.user._id — since both are strings (UUID), comparison works. OK.
test_credentials: See /app/memory/test_credentials.md — principal/Principal@123, admin/Admin@123, accountant/Account@123, t.kavita/Teacher@123, parent.gupta/Parent@123.
seed_data_creation: Seed data auto-populated via node seed.js at backend startup. During testing, additional TEST_ prefixed rows were created (students, teachers, holidays, enquiries, announcements, leaves, fees marked paid). These do not affect core seed integrity but cumulative test runs will grow enquiry/announcement counts.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend Node.js + Mongoose is production-ready. Pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers all endpoints and can be re-run as regression. Frontend uses data-testid extensively — all interactive elements testable via selectors. Note: Fees page uses testid 'sidebar-fee-management' for accountant and 'sidebar-fee-status' for principal/parent (both point to /dashboard/fees route). Attendance page requires ~3s wait after navigation to render student rows. Confetti appears as a full-viewport canvas element after leave approval and can be detected by querying 'canvas'.
